ddls:
CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  "owner_type" TEXT /* Type of owner (e.g., individual, company, etc.) */,
  "identification_number" TEXT /* Owner's identification number (e.g., SSN, EIN, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "brokerage" TEXT /* Brokerage of the agent */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Agent's real estate license number */,
  "brokerage_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent's brokerage */,
  "agent_type" TEXT /* Type of agent (e.g., listing agent, selling agent, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being listed */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent listing the property */,
  "list_date" TEXT /* Date the property was listed */,
  "list_price" INTEGER /* Price at which the property was listed */,
  "listing_status" TEXT /* Current status of the listing (e.g., active, pending, sold, etc.) */,
  "list_price_history" TEXT /* History of changes to the listing price */,
  "listing_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the listing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing that was sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the property was sold */,
  "sale_price" INTEGER /* Price at which the property was sold */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale (e.g., cash, mortgage, etc.) */,
  "sale_commission" INTEGER /* Commission earned from the sale */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date the sale was closed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rentals" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being rented */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tenant renting the property */,
  "rent" INTEGER /* Rent amount */,
  "lease_start" TEXT /* Start date of the lease */,
  "lease_end" TEXT /* End date of the lease */,
  "lease_type" TEXT /* Type of lease (e.g., fixed-term, month-to-month, etc.) */,
  "rent_payment_terms" TEXT /* Terms of rent payments (e.g., monthly, quarterly, etc.) */,
  "security_deposit" INTEGER /* Security deposit amount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tenants" (
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tenant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tenant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the tenant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the tenant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the tenant */,
  "tenant_type" TEXT /* Type of tenant (e.g., individual, company, etc.) */,
  "identification_number" TEXT /* Tenant's identification number (e.g., SSN, EIN, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance request */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property for which maintenance was requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance request was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance request */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency, etc.) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the maintenance request (e.g., high, low, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repairs" (
  "repair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repair */,
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the maintenance request for which the repair was made */,
  "repair_date" TEXT /* Date the repair was made */,
  "cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the repair */,
  "repair_type" TEXT /* Type of repair (e.g., plumbing, electrical, etc.) */,
  "repair_status" TEXT /* Current status of the repair (e.g., pending, completed, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repairs_maintenance_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintenance_id") REFERENCES maintenance ("maintenance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "renovations" (
  "renovation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each renovation */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being renovated */,
  "renovation_date" TEXT /* Date the renovation was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the renovation */,
  "cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the renovation */,
  "renovation_type" TEXT /* Type of renovation (e.g., major, minor, etc.) */,
  "renovation_status" TEXT /* Current status of the renovation (e.g., pending, completed, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("renovation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property for which the payment was made */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property for which the expense was incurred */,
  "expense_date" TEXT /* Date the expense was incurred */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the expense */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id")
)
